case_title: NU TO LUC ET AL VS. C & D REALTY CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED NOV-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, RUTH
DECLARATION OF UPDATED ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUC, NU TO DANG, HUE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,145.00 FILED BY LUC, NU TO DANG, HUE AS TO DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION ETORMA, CHRISTINA ETORMA, DENNIS ANDERSON, RUTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED NOV-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAR-03-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NO TO LUC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH WARD. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, RUTH -EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT'S SON JOSEPH WARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR A CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO FEB-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NU TO LUC IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY THUAN TRAN, SON IN LAW, AND WITNESS BIN LUC DAUGHTER. MR TRAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK PLAINTIFF HUE DANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ETORMA, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE ETORMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS ETORMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUTH ANDERSON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH WARD. MR. WARD GIVES THE COURT A COPY OF LETTER VERIFING MS. ANDERSON'S CONDITION. THE COURT ALLOWS JOSEPH WARD TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT RUTH ANDERSON. ***SERVICE IS SATISFIED FOR DEFENDANT ANDERSON. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST CHRISTINA ETORMA AND DENNIS ETORMA AS INDIVIDUALS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED NOV-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ETORMA, DENNIS
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR CANTONESE INTERPERTER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUC, NU TO DANG, HUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, RUTH $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025. CASE AGAINST CHRISTINE ETORMA AND DENNIS ETORMA IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED NOV-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ETORMA, CHRISTINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NU TO LUC IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. PLAINTIFF HUE DANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. WITNESSES FOR THE PLAINTIFF THUAN TRAN, SON-IN-LAW, AND VINH LUC, DAUGHTER ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT C & D REALTY CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ETORMA PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT RUTH ANDERSON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH WARD, SON IN LAW (ALLOWED AT THE LAST HEARING DATE). DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE & DENNIS ETORMA ARE PRESENT AND WERE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE LAST HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF AND BOTH DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, RUTH
